versions.version_description: Capo on 1st fret, standard chord names, cleaned up lyrics, chord alignment, and song structure.

tuning: E A D G B E

[tab][Chords]
   [ch]Bb7[/ch]  [ch]Bb7sus[/ch]  [ch]Ebm7[/ch]    [ch]Db[/ch]  Cm7(b5)      [ch]Cb[/ch]    [ch]Abm7[/ch]   [ch]Db/F[/ch]   [ch]Cbmaj7[/ch]     [ch]Bb7(#5)/D[/ch]

[Intro]
[ch]Bb7[/ch]    [ch]Bb7sus[/ch]      [ch]Bb7[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Ebm7[/ch]       [ch]Db[/ch]       Cm7(b5)      [ch]Cb[/ch]       [ch]Ebm7[/ch]     [ch]Db[/ch]    Cm7(b5)         [ch]Bb7sus[/ch]  [ch]Bb7[/ch]
Things     haven't been the same        since you came  into my    life.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Ebm7[/ch]            [ch]Db[/ch]       Cm7(b5)     [ch]Cb[/ch]                 [ch]Bb7[/ch]                              [ch]Bb7sus[/ch]    [ch]Bb7[/ch] 
You  found  a  way  to  touch  my  soul   and  I'm  never  ever  ever  gonna  let it go.[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Abm7[/ch]               [ch]Bb7sus[/ch]               [ch]Ebm7[/ch]
      Happiness  lies  in  your own hands.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Db/F[/ch]                                   [ch]Abm7[/ch]                        [ch]Bbm7[/ch]                           [ch]Cbmaj7[/ch]
It  took  me  much  to  long   to understand   how   it   could  be,[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]Db[/ch]        [ch]Bb7(#5)/D[/ch]                      [ch]Ebm7[/ch]                 [ch]Db[/ch]
until  you  shared your  secret  with  me.[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]Cm7(b5)                   [ch]Cb[/ch]      [ch]Ebm7[/ch]               [ch]Db[/ch]
Something's  coming  over    Mmm[/tab]
[tab]Cm7(b5)                   [ch]Cb[/ch]      [ch]Ebm7[/ch]               [ch]Db[/ch]
Somethin's   coming   over    Mmm[/tab]
Cm7(b5)                   Cb           Bb7
Something   coming   over    Me
[tab]        [ch]Bb7sus[/ch]              [ch]Bb7[/ch]
My  baby's   got   a   Secret.[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Ebm7[/ch]             [ch]Db[/ch]               Cm7(b5)        [ch]Cb[/ch]     [ch]Ebm7[/ch]     [ch]Db[/ch]           Cm7(b5)      [ch]Bb7sus[/ch]  [ch]Bb7[/ch]
You gave me  back  the  paradise  that  I       thought   I  lost  for   good[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Ebm7[/ch]            [ch]Db[/ch]         Cm7(b5)    [ch]Cb[/ch]       [ch]Bb7[/ch]                                     [ch]Bb7sus[/ch]    [ch]Bb7[/ch] 
You  helped   me  find    the  reason   why  it   took   me by  surprise that you understood[/tab]

[Verse 3]
[tab][ch]Ebm7[/ch]        [ch]Db[/ch]               Cm7(b5)    [ch]Cb[/ch]       [ch]Ebm7[/ch]     [ch]Db[/ch]            Cm7(b5)         [ch]Bb7sus[/ch]  [ch]Bb7[/ch]
          You knew all along                what  I     never  wanted  to  say.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Ebm7[/ch]      [ch]Db[/ch]          Cm7(b5)    [ch]Cb[/ch]            [ch]Bb7[/ch]                              [ch]Bb7sus[/ch]     [ch]Bb7[/ch] 
Until   I  learned  to  love     myself I  was  never   ever   loving  anybody  else.[/tab]
